name: uderia-browser
description: Headless browser automation via Playwright. Provides navigate, click, fill_form, screenshot, scrape, and extract_data tools.

tool_schemas.name: navigate
tool_schemas.description: Navigate the headless browser to a URL and return the page title and status.

tool_schemas.name: click
tool_schemas.description: Click an element on the current page identified by a CSS selector.

arguments.name: selector
arguments.description: CSS selector of the element to click.

tool_schemas.name: fill_form
tool_schemas.description: Fill a form field on the current page with a value.

arguments.name: selector
arguments.description: CSS selector of the input field.

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: Value to type into the field.

tool_schemas.name: screenshot
tool_schemas.description: Take a screenshot of the current browser page and return it as a base64-encoded PNG.

arguments.name: full_page
arguments.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the viewport (default: false).

tool_schemas.name: scrape
tool_schemas.description: Navigate to a URL and return the full page text content.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The URL to navigate to and scrape.

tool_schemas.name: extract_data
tool_schemas.description: Extract text content from elements matching a CSS selector on the current page.

arguments.name: selector
arguments.description: CSS selector to extract content from.

ALLOWED_DOMAINS.label: Allowed domains
ALLOWED_DOMAINS.description: Comma-separated domain allowlist (e.g. example.com,docs.company.com). Leave empty to allow all.

HEADLESS.label: Headless mode
HEADLESS.description: Run browser in headless mode (recommended for server deployments).

PAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.label: Page timeout (seconds)
PAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Maximum time to wait for page load.
